properties.name: Feature: Steadfast5e - HP Debloat
properties.author: Kerry Harrison (sirkerry)
properties.description: Compresses PC and NPC hit points for grittier, more lethal 5E play. Level 1: max hit die + CON modifier. Each level beyond 1st: max hit die / 2, no additional CON. Multiclass characters use the highest-die class for the level 1 calculation. Options: apply formula to monsters; auto-apply or prompt on level up.
